---
title: "Deep Learning Widget"
---

## Overview

The `DeepLearning_Widget` library provides the Qt UI for loading TorchScript
models, binding DataManager inputs and outputs, capturing static memory tensors
into the session DataBank, and running single-frame, batch, and recurrent
inference.

Core model logic lives in the [`DeepLearning`](../DeepLearning/index.qmd)
library; this widget coordinates `SlotAssembler`, `DeepLearningState`, and
`InferenceController` from the GUI.

## Source location

`src/WhiskerToolbox/DeepLearning_Widget/`

## Directory structure

```
DeepLearning_Widget/
├── DeepLearningWidgetRegistration.hpp/cpp   ← EditorRegistry module entry
├── Core/
│   ├── DeepLearningState.hpp/cpp              ← EditorState subclass
│   └── SlotAssembler.hpp/cpp                  ← Binding assembly + inference
├── Inference/
│   ├── InferenceController.hpp/cpp            ← Run orchestration
│   ├── BatchInferenceWorker.hpp/cpp           ← Single-range batch worker
│   ├── MultiIntervalBatchWorker.hpp/cpp       ← Multi-interval batch worker
│   └── ResultProcessor.hpp/cpp                ← Result merge helpers
└── UI/
    ├── DeepLearningViewWidget.hpp/cpp         ← View panel
    ├── DeepLearningPropertiesWidget.hpp/cpp   ← Properties panel coordinator
    ├── DataBank/                              ← Memory bank capture + preview
    └── Helpers/                               ← Per-slot schema-driven sub-widgets
```

## Related documentation

- [Binding parameter schemas](../../DeepLearning/bindings/binding_param_schemas.qmd)
- [Memory frame bindings](../../DeepLearning/bindings/memory_frames.qmd)
- [Post-encoder modules](../../DeepLearning/post_encoder_modules.qmd)
- [Schema-driven forms](../schema_driven_forms.qmd)
